name: grocery-api-newman-suite
description: Postman/Newman automation suite for the Simple Grocery Store API.

scripts.test:categories: newman run collections/grocery.data.postman_collection.json -e environments/prod.postman_environment.json --folder Categories -d data/categories.csv -r cli,htmlextra,junit --reporter-htmlextra-export results/report-categories.html --reporter-junit-export results/junit-categories.xml
scripts.test:bva: newman run collections/grocery.data.postman_collection.json -e environments/prod.postman_environment.json --folder "Results BVA" -d data/results-bva.csv -r cli,htmlextra,junit --reporter-htmlextra-export results/report-bva.html --reporter-junit-export results/junit-bva.xml
scripts.test:quantities: newman run collections/grocery.data.postman_collection.json -e environments/prod.postman_environment.json --folder Quantities -d data/quantities.csv -r cli,htmlextra,junit --reporter-htmlextra-export results/report-quantities.html --reporter-junit-export results/junit-quantities.xml
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:categories && npm run test:bva && npm run test:quantities
